title: Decadent Creamy Kenyan Tempeh Grill
description: A rich and creamy Kenyan dish featuring tempeh, perfect for a hangover cure, with a blend of ayurvedic-tamasic-friendly ingredients. This buttery and indulgent recipe is sure to satisfy your cravings.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together coconut milk, tomato paste, cumin, coriander, salt, and black pepper.
Add the tempeh to the bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Remove the tempeh from the marinade and grill for 5 minutes per side, or until golden brown.
In a large skillet, melt 2 tablespoons of butter over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion to the skillet and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger to the skillet and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Add the grilled tempeh to the skillet and stir to combine with the onion mixture.
Pour the remaining marinade into the skillet and bring to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let cook for 10 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened.
Stir in the remaining 2 tablespoons of butter until melted and creamy.
